highlights.title: More flexible and open
highlights.summary: COBIT 2019 is designed to be more easily adapted to organizational needs. This framework can be an umbrella that covers other standards that are already in use, without forcing total change.
details: Bisa dipakai sebagai payung tata kelola di atas banyak referensi yang sudah dipakai organisasi.
Membuka ruang penyesuaian tanpa memaksa semua organisasi memakai bentuk yang sama persis.

highlights.title: Stay relevant to change
highlights.summary: This latest version is more responsive to changing times: digital transformation, new business models, and ever-evolving stakeholder demands. Organizations can remain relevant even though the environment is changing rapidly.
details: Relevan untuk lingkungan bisnis yang berubah cepat dan sangat bergantung pada informasi serta teknologi.
Membantu organisasi menjaga arah tata kelola tetap nyambung dengan kondisi mutakhir.

highlights.title: More targeted implementation
highlights.summary: With design factors and focus areas, COBIT 2019 helps organizations translate governance theory into practices that suit their respective business contexts.
details: Organisasi bisa memulai dari konteks bisnis, profil risiko, dan cara kerja aktualnya sendiri.
Struktur ini membantu memutuskan prioritas objective yang paling penting lebih dulu.

highlights.title: Performance management is clearer
highlights.summary: COBIT 2019 introduces more structured governance and management objectives, making it easier for organizations to map what needs to be managed and who is responsible.
details: Memudahkan pembacaan target, kondisi saat ini, dan area yang perlu diperkuat.
Cocok dipakai untuk diskusi roadmap, assurance, dan peningkatan berkelanjutan.

value_outcomes.title: Realization of benefits
value_outcomes.summary: I&T investments and capabilities must truly help enterprises achieve their business goals.
details: Fokusnya bukan sekadar proyek selesai, tapi hasilnya terasa pada operasi dan keputusan bisnis.
Nilai harus terlihat pada layanan, proses, pengalaman stakeholder, atau pertumbuhan enterprise.

value_outcomes.title: Risk optimization
value_outcomes.summary: COBIT encourages risk-aware decision making, not just the pursuit of control or speed of implementation.
details: Risiko informasi dan teknologi perlu dikelola sejalan dengan risk appetite enterprise.
Tata kelola yang baik membantu menyeimbangkan peluang, ancaman, dan ketahanan operasional.

value_outcomes.title: Resource optimization
value_outcomes.summary: People, data, applications, infrastructure and budgets must be used with the right priorities and can be accounted for.
details: Resource optimization menjaga supaya kapasitas penting dipakai di tempat yang paling memberi dampak.
Hal ini membantu enterprise menghindari duplikasi, pemborosan, dan gap akuntabilitas.

chapters.title: Introduction
chapters.summary: Explain why enterprise governance of information and technology is important amidst business dependence on I&T.
details: Membuka konteks nilai, risiko, dan kebutuhan arahan tata kelola.
Menempatkan COBIT sebagai kerangka untuk membantu pengambilan keputusan tingkat enterprise.

chapters.title: Intended Audience
chapters.summary: Describe who the main readers of COBIT 2019 are and the benefits they get from this framework.
details: Mencakup board, manajemen eksekutif, pemilik proses, tim I&T, risk, compliance, dan assurance.
Menegaskan bahwa COBIT dipakai lintas peran, bukan hanya untuk fungsi teknologi.

chapters.title: COBIT Principles
chapters.summary: Contains the core principles underlying the governance system and the principles of the COBIT framework itself.
details: Bab ini jadi fondasi cara pikir sebelum masuk ke objective dan desain penerapan.
Prinsip COBIT membantu menjaga konsistensi antara nilai bisnis dan praktik tata kelola.

chapters.title: Governance Systems and Components
chapters.summary: Explains the basic concept of a governance system, its components, goals cascade, and focus areas as a way to see the enterprise as a whole.
details: Bab ini membantu pembaca memahami bagaimana objective tidak berdiri sendiri.
Komponen dan goals cascade jadi jembatan antara kebutuhan bisnis dan praktik operasional.

chapters.title: Governance and Management Objectives
chapters.summary: Introducing the COBIT core model which consists of objective governance and management as the main structure of the framework.
details: Core model inilah yang nanti dipakai untuk menilai, memprioritaskan, dan merancang governance system.
Objective dibagi ke domain governance dan management dengan peran yang berbeda.

chapters.title: Performance Management in COBIT
chapters.summary: Discusses how to read performance, targets, and increase capability in the objectives chosen by the enterprise.
details: Bab ini membantu organisasi melihat progress secara lebih terstruktur.
Performance management membuat diskusi peningkatan lebih konkret dan tidak kabur.

chapters.title: Designing a Tailored Governance System
chapters.summary: Explain how design factors are used to adapt governance systems to the context of each enterprise.
details: Fokusnya adalah desain yang relevan, bukan copy-paste semua objective secara merata.
Bab ini penting untuk prioritisasi dan penentuan cakupan awal implementasi.

chapters.title: Implementing Enterprise Governance of I&T
chapters.summary: Provides a gradual implementation flow so that COBIT is used as a change journey, not just a reference document.
details: Terdapat fase dari memahami driver sampai menjaga momentum perbaikan.
Bab ini cocok dipakai untuk menyusun roadmap dan change plan.

chapters.title: Getting Started: Making the Case
chapters.summary: Help build a business case and initial narrative for why the enterprise needs to move with a COBIT approach.
details: Berguna untuk sponsor awal, penyelarasan stakeholder, dan penentuan quick wins.
Menjembatani antara konsep framework dan kebutuhan adopsi nyata.

chapters.title: Standards, Frameworks, and Regulations
chapters.summary: Demonstrates COBIT's position in other reference ecosystems and why this framework is suitable for use as a cross-reference link.
details: Bab ini menguatkan peran COBIT sebagai integrator, bukan pengganti tunggal semua standar lain.
Sangat berguna saat enterprise harus merapikan banyak referensi kepatuhan sekaligus.

principles_system.title: Provide value to stakeholders
principles_system.summary: Governance systems must ensure that benefits are realized, risks are optimized, and resources are used responsibly.
principles_system.importance: Prinsip ini memastikan diskusi I&T selalu kembali ke nilai bisnis dan kebutuhan stakeholder.
focus: Link I&T decisions to enterprise goals.
Keep a balance between benefits, risks and resources.
Use business results as the main measuring point.
principles_system.analogy: Like cooking for the family. There's no point in cooking expensive things if no one likes it. Governance must provide values ​​that stakeholders really need.

principles_system.title: Holistic approach
principles_system.summary: Governance is not simply built from processes alone; he must see the organization as a complete system.
principles_system.importance: Enterprise biasanya gagal bukan karena satu komponen hilang, tetapi karena antar-komponen tidak nyambung.
focus: See process, structure, culture, information, and people as one package.
Avoid solutions that only fix one side.
Make sure the relationships between components are clearly visible.
principles_system.analogy: Just like checking your car at a repair shop. You can't just change the oil but ignore the brake failure. It must be seen holistically from all components.

principles_system.title: Governance systems are dynamic
principles_system.summary: Governance systems need to be able to respond to changes in strategy, threats, technology and stakeholder needs.
principles_system.importance: Framework yang tidak bergerak akan cepat tertinggal dari realitas bisnis dan risiko aktual.
focus: Revisit designs as the enterprise context changes.
Incorporate external changes into governance evaluations.
Keep the governance system alive, not static.
principles_system.analogy: It's like flying a kite. If the wind changes direction, you have to adjust the drag. Governance must also be dynamic, following business and technological changes.

principles_system.title: Governance is different from management
principles_system.summary: Governance establishes direction, evaluation and monitoring; management executes, plans, builds, and operates.
principles_system.importance: Pemisahan ini membantu akuntabilitas tetap jelas antara pengarah dan pelaksana.
focus: The board and top management focus on evaluation and direction.
The management team focuses on planning and execution.
Do not mix supervisory roles with daily operational activities.
principles_system.analogy: It's like the difference between a boss and an executor. The boss (governance) sets direction and evaluates it, while the team (management) carries out daily operations.

principles_system.title: Adapted to enterprise needs
principles_system.summary: COBIT is not intended to be applied uniformly; the design needs to be adapted to the context, priorities and maturity level of the enterprise.
principles_system.importance: Prinsip ini mencegah implementasi yang terlalu generik dan tidak relevan dengan kondisi aktual organisasi.
focus: Use the business context as a starting point for design.
Prioritize the most impactful objectives first.
Match the depth of implementation to enterprise capacity.
principles_system.analogy: Similar to buying clothes from a tailor vs buying them ready made. Management must be tailored so that it fits the body size (needs) of the organization, don't wear baggy clothes.

principles_system.title: Covers the enterprise end-to-end
principles_system.summary: Governance systems must look at the entire enterprise, not just IT functions or specific projects.
principles_system.importance: Informasi dan teknologi memengaruhi banyak unit, jadi governance tidak boleh terkotak dalam satu silo.
focus: View I&T as part of overall enterprise operations.
Incorporate cross-unit relationships into governance design.
Make sure objectives are relevant to the business, not just the IT function.
principles_system.analogy: Like an airport security system. Not only is the front gate guarded, but everything from entering the parking lot to luggage must be monitored end-to-end.

principles_framework.title: Based on a conceptual model
principles_framework.summary: COBIT is built on a conceptual model that helps the relationships between goals, objectives, components, and results remain consistent.
principles_framework.importance: Model yang jelas membuat framework lebih mudah dijelaskan, dipetakan, dan dikembangkan.
focus: Maintain the connection between concepts, objectives and outcomes.
Use the model as a communication tool across stakeholders.
Make sure the design remains logical as it expands.
principles_framework.analogy: Like the foundation of a house. The framework must have a clear conceptual model so that if you want to add floors in the future it doesn't collapse easily.

principles_framework.title: Open and flexible
principles_framework.summary: This framework is designed to be easily expanded, integrated, and adapted to enterprise needs and other frameworks.
principles_framework.importance: Organisasi jarang hanya memakai satu referensi, jadi fleksibilitas menjadi syarat penting.
focus: Integrate COBIT with existing standards.
Use focus areas or additional adjustments if necessary.
Let the framework evolve according to enterprise needs.
principles_framework.analogy: It's like playing with Lego. A good framework is open and flexible, it can be combined with other standard pieces without having to destroy the original form.

principles_framework.title: Aligned with key standards, frameworks and regulations
principles_framework.summary: COBIT helps bridge governance needs with other more technical, sectoral or regulatory references.
principles_framework.importance: Penyelarasan ini membuat COBIT kuat dipakai sebagai bahasa bersama untuk governance.
focus: Use COBIT as a link between references.
Make it easy to read cross-standard compliance.
Maintain consistent governance decisions based on multiple references.
principles_framework.analogy: Just like a universal adapter. COBIT can connect various standards, frameworks and other regulations so that the plugs all match.

components.title: Processes
components.summary: The process explains the activities and work flows that need to occur so that governance and management objectives are actually carried out.
components.importance: Tanpa proses yang jelas, banyak keputusan governance berhenti di atas kertas.
focus: Define inputs, outputs, responsibilities, and process measurements.
Make sure the process supports the selected objectives.
Use the process as a working mechanism, not just documentation.
components.analogy: Like SOP at a fast food restaurant. The process is the recipe and steps that make a burger always taste the same even if the chef is different.

components.title: Organizational Structures
components.summary: The organizational structure determines who makes decisions, who directs, and who is responsible.
components.importance: Banyak masalah governance sebenarnya berasal dari peran dan jalur keputusan yang kabur.
focus: Clarify the roles of the board, committees, and management.
Set a reasonable escalation path.
Ensure the structure supports cross-unit accountability.
components.analogy: Like a hierarchy chart on the battlefield. The organizational structure determines who is the general who gives orders and who is the soldier who goes to the front.

components.title: Principles, Policies and Procedures
components.summary: This component translates governance direction into rules, guidelines and ways of working that can be followed consistently.
components.importance: Kebijakan yang baik membuat keputusan tidak terlalu bergantung pada orang tertentu saja.
focus: Ensure policies support enterprise priorities.
Get policies down to workable procedures.
Keep documentation relevant and not overwhelming.
components.analogy: Similar to traffic signs. These principles and policies regulate when you can go and when you have to stop so you don't get into a collision.

components.title: Information
components.summary: Information is the main material for decision making, monitoring and performance evaluation in the governance system.
components.importance: Governance yang baik butuh informasi yang tepat, akurat, relevan, dan tersedia saat dibutuhkan.
focus: Make sure important information is of sufficient quality.
Maintain access, integrity and relevance of information.
Use the information to monitor outcomes and risks.
components.analogy: Like the dashboard in a car. This information tells how much fuel is left and the engine speed, so the driver can make the right decision.

components.title: Culture, Ethics and Behavior
components.summary: Culture and behavior determine whether governance decisions actually live in the daily life of the enterprise.
components.importance: Kontrol yang bagus tetap bisa gagal jika perilaku organisasi bergerak ke arah yang sebaliknya.
focus: Build behaviors that support accountability and transparency.
Pay attention to incentives, habits, and tone from the top.
See culture as a core part, not an add-on.
components.analogy: Ibarat budaya antre. If the ethics are correct, there is no need for security guards to guard them, people will automatically discipline themselves.

components.title: People, Skills and Competencies
components.summary: People and their abilities determine whether the company is able to carry out the objectives that have been chosen.
components.importance: Desain governance yang rapi akan tersendat jika peran kunci tidak didukung skill yang sesuai.
focus: Understand the skill requirements for prioritized objectives.
Fill the most critical competency gaps first.
Ensure people's capabilities evolve with enterprise needs.
components.analogy: Like choosing a pirate crew. People, skills and competencies determine whether your ship can weather the storm or sink along the way.

components.title: Services, Infrastructure and Applications
components.summary: Service capabilities and technical platforms must support real governance decisions in the field.
components.importance: Objective governance perlu ditopang kemampuan operasional yang benar-benar tersedia dan stabil.
focus: See whether services and platforms support the intended outcomes.
Make sure architecture and technical assets do not become a bottleneck.
Link governance decisions to real service readiness.
components.analogy: Just like combat equipment. Services and infrastructure are your weapons; It's no use a good strategy if the weapon is rusty.

design_factors.title: Enterprise Strategy
design_factors.summary: Enterprise strategy influences which governance objectives need to be prioritized.
design_factors.importance: COBIT menekankan bahwa desain governance harus mulai dari arah bisnis, bukan dari daftar kontrol.
focus: Read objectives through the lens of growth, innovation, stability, or service strategy.
Align governance priorities with enterprise strategic objectives.
design_factors.analogy: Like a racing car vs a family car. If the strategy seeks innovation, governance must be flexible. If you are looking for stability, the controls must be strong.
details: Baca objective melalui lensa strategi pertumbuhan, inovasi, stabilitas, atau layanan.
Selaraskan prioritas governance dengan tujuan strategis enterprise.
educational_tips: Sangat penting! Jika strategi perusahaan adalah Inovasi, maka tata kelola harus fleksibel dan cepat.
Jangan gunakan kontrol yang terlalu ketat jika bisnis membutuhkan kelincahan tinggi.

design_factors.title: Enterprise Goals
design_factors.summary: Enterprise goals help determine what outcomes most need to be protected or enhanced through I&T.
design_factors.importance: Tanpa melihat goal enterprise, objective governance mudah terasa generik dan tidak tajam.
focus: Connect governance with the business goals that are actually being pursued.
Use enterprise goals as a common language across stakeholders.
design_factors.analogy: Just like determining a holiday destination on GPS. This governance is just a vehicle, goals are the destination. It has to be in sync for it to arrive.
details: Hubungkan governance dengan sasaran bisnis yang benar-benar sedang dikejar.
Gunakan goal enterprise sebagai bahasa bersama lintas stakeholder.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Risk Profile
design_factors.summary: An enterprise risk profile helps determine the objectives that need to be strengthened to control the most important exposures.
design_factors.importance: Prioritas governance akan berbeda antara enterprise dengan profil risiko yang berbeda.
focus: Map the most material risks to the enterprise.
Use risk profiles to clarify objective and component priorities.
design_factors.analogy: It's like choosing a type of insurance. If you like extreme sports, you need maximum coverage. Governance must be aligned with the greatest risks.
details: Petakan risiko yang paling material bagi enterprise.
Gunakan profil risiko untuk memperjelas prioritas objective dan komponen.
educational_tips: Fokuskan sumber daya pada area dengan 'Risk Exposure' tertinggi.
Gunakan COBIT untuk memitigasi risiko-risiko kritikal yang teridentifikasi.

design_factors.title: I&T-Related Issues
design_factors.summary: Current I&T problems signal which areas of governance need to be addressed most first.
design_factors.importance: Design factor ini menjaga agar desain tidak buta terhadap problem nyata yang sedang dirasakan enterprise.
focus: Look for recurring issues, bottlenecks, or service failures.
Use actual issues as a driver for quick wins and initial priorities.
design_factors.analogy: Similar to going to the repair shop because the engine often stops. Your management must immediately focus on treating congenital diseases that are often complained of.
details: Lihat issue yang berulang, bottleneck, atau kegagalan layanan.
Pakai issue aktual sebagai pendorong quick win dan prioritas awal.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Threat Landscape
design_factors.summary: The threat environment influences the need for control, response, monitoring, and the level of governance alertness.
design_factors.importance: Ancaman yang berubah cepat menuntut governance system yang tidak kaku.
focus: Pay attention to threat trends that are most relevant to the enterprise.
Match governance priorities to the level of threat exposure.
design_factors.analogy: It's like installing a house pager in an area prone to thieves vs elites. External threats determine how strict security guards are prepared.
details: Perhatikan tren ancaman yang paling relevan bagi enterprise.
Sesuaikan prioritas governance dengan tingkat eksposur ancaman.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Compliance Requirements
design_factors.summary: Compliance obligations will impact the depth of documentation, assurance, reporting and controls required.
design_factors.importance: Enterprise yang berada di sektor sangat teregulasi perlu desain governance yang lebih eksplisit dan siap audit.
focus: Map out the regulations and obligations that most shape how your enterprise works.
Use COBIT to streamline governance and compliance alignment.
design_factors.analogy: It's like playing football in an official league. Like it or not, you have to follow the rules and regulations of the game, otherwise you will get a red card.
details: Petakan regulasi dan kewajiban yang paling membentuk cara kerja enterprise.
Gunakan COBIT untuk merapikan penyelarasan governance dan compliance.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Role of IT
design_factors.summary: The role of I&T in the enterprise, whether as support, factory, turnaround, or strategic, will change the weight of objective priorities.
design_factors.importance: Governance di enterprise yang sangat digital tidak bisa disamakan dengan enterprise yang fungsi TI-nya masih terbatas.
focus: Understand how critical I&T is to the enterprise business model.
Use the role of I&T to determine the required governance intensity.
design_factors.analogy: The difference between IT as a factory and support. If the factory shuts down, the business closes. If it's just support, standard controls are enough.
details: Pahami seberapa kritikal I&T dalam model bisnis enterprise.
Gunakan peran I&T untuk menentukan intensitas governance yang dibutuhkan.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Sourcing Model for IT
design_factors.summary: The choice of sourcing, internal, outsourced, cloud, hybrid, affects control, accountability and oversight mechanisms.
design_factors.importance: Model sourcing mengubah siapa yang menjalankan layanan dan siapa yang tetap harus bertanggung jawab.
focus: Don't assume governance risks disappear just because services are outsourced.
Clarify cross-party control and accountability.
design_factors.analogy: Like eating at a restaurant vs cooking yourself. Even if you outsource, you are still the one responsible for the consequences if the food makes you stomach ache.
details: Jangan anggap risiko governance hilang hanya karena layanan dialihdayakan.
Perjelas kontrol dan akuntabilitas lintas pihak.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Implementation Methods for IT
design_factors.summary: The way enterprises build and change I&T solutions, traditional, agile, or hybrid, needs to be reflected in governance design.
design_factors.importance: Governance yang tidak cocok dengan cara delivery akan mudah ditolak atau diabaikan.
focus: Align governance with the delivery method used by the team.
Keep the control on without turning off the working speed.
design_factors.analogy: It's like choosing a running style: sprint vs marathon. Governance for agile teams must be fast and not bureaucratic.
details: Selaraskan governance dengan metode delivery yang dipakai tim.
Jaga supaya kontrol tetap hidup tanpa mematikan kecepatan kerja.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Technology Adoption Strategy
design_factors.summary: The pace of technology adoption, whether conservative or aggressive, influences the need for oversight and the tolerance of experimentation.
design_factors.importance: Enterprise yang agresif mengadopsi teknologi baru memerlukan governance yang lebih sigap dan sadar risiko.
focus: Understand the enterprise technology adoption style before determining controls.
Adjust the rhythm of review and supervision to adoption patterns.
design_factors.analogy: Just like being an early adopter of a new gadget. If you aggressively use the latest technology, governance must be prepared to bear errors.
details: Pahami gaya adopsi teknologi enterprise sebelum menentukan kontrol.
Sesuaikan ritme review dan pengawasan dengan pola adopsi.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

design_factors.title: Enterprise Size
design_factors.summary: The size of the enterprise influences the complexity of the structure, the formality of the processes, and the way objectives are carried out.
design_factors.importance: Skala organisasi menentukan seberapa ringan atau formal governance system perlu dibentuk.
focus: Adjust the level of formality to the size and complexity of the enterprise.
Don't impose a large structure on an organization that is still lean.
design_factors.analogy: It's like setting up a startup vs a giant corporation. RT regulations vary in complexity from country to country, don't wear baggy clothes.
details: Sesuaikan tingkat formalitas dengan ukuran dan kompleksitas enterprise.
Jangan memaksakan struktur besar pada organisasi yang masih ramping.
educational_tips: Lakukan asesmen berkala terhadap faktor ini karena konteks bisnis bisa berubah.
Libatkan pemilik proses bisnis dalam menentukan bobot faktor ini.

domains.title: Evaluate, Direct and Monitor
domains.summary: The governance domain focuses on evaluating, providing direction, and monitoring results at the enterprise level.
domains.importance: EDM menjaga agar board dan pimpinan punya titik pijak yang jelas dalam mengarahkan I&T.
focus: Determine enterprise level direction and expectations.
Monitoring whether the desired results are actually achieved.
Maintain strong governance accountability.
domains.analogy: Like a board of commissioners or football club owners. They don't participate in kicking the ball on the field, but choose coaches, determine winning targets, and evaluate performance.
domains.reporting: Dashboard kinerja tata kelola TI bulanan.

domains.title: Align, Plan and Organize
domains.summary: Domain management that organizes direction, planning, architecture, portfolio and organization of I&T capabilities.
domains.importance: APO membantu menyelaraskan keputusan manajemen dengan arah enterprise dan kebutuhan governance.
focus: Develop policies, plans and organizing models.
Manage I&T capability direction and priorities.
domains.analogy: Like a football club manager and architect. They make strategies, set tactics, design formations and manage transfer budgets so that the team is ready to compete.
domains.reporting: Dashboard kinerja tata kelola TI bulanan.

domains.title: Build, Acquire and Implement
domains.summary: Domain management that manages changes, solution development, acquisition and implementation of new capabilities.
domains.importance: BAI penting untuk memastikan perubahan I&T tidak lepas dari arah governance dan kebutuhan bisnis.
focus: Manage change, delivery, and implementation readiness.
Ensure that new solutions add value and do not add to chaos.
domains.analogy: Just like the construction and recruitment team. They carried out stadium renovations, bought new players, and made sure everything was ready to use before kickoff.
domains.reporting: Dashboard kinerja tata kelola TI bulanan.

domains.title: Deliver, Service and Support
domains.summary: Domain management related to service operations, support, security, continuity and daily service processing.
domains.importance: DSS membuat governance terasa nyata dalam operasi sehari-hari dan kualitas layanan yang diterima bisnis.
focus: Keep services running stable and responsive.
Manage operations, service support, and operational control.
domains.analogy: This is the operational staff and daily medical team. They are the ones who ensure the field remains green, logistics are safe, and injured players are immediately treated.
domains.reporting: Dashboard kinerja tata kelola TI bulanan.

domains.title: Monitor, Evaluate and Assess
domains.summary: Domain management ensures that performance, internal control, compliance and effectiveness of objectives are monitored and assessed.
domains.importance: MEA memberi ruang refleksi dan assurance agar enterprise tahu apa yang bekerja dan apa yang perlu diperbaiki.
focus: Monitor performance and compliance regularly.
Generate insights for continuous improvement.
domains.analogy: Like a referee and VAR analyst. They monitor from outside the field to ensure that the rules are followed and provide reports on anything that is wrong for evaluation.
domains.reporting: Dashboard kinerja tata kelola TI bulanan.

goal_cascade.title: Stakeholder drivers
goal_cascade.summary: Stakeholder needs, pressures and expectations become the initial trigger for governance direction.
details: Mulai dari apa yang benar-benar diminta, dikhawatirkan, atau diharapkan stakeholder.
Driver ini menjadi konteks untuk membaca prioritas enterprise.

goal_cascade.title: Enterprise goals
goal_cascade.summary: Stakeholder drivers are translated into more concrete and directable enterprise goals.
details: Tujuan enterprise membantu memilih outcome yang ingin dicapai.
Di sinilah bahasa bisnis mulai dipertajam.

goal_cascade.title: Alignment goals
goal_cascade.summary: Enterprise goals are then reduced to alignment goals so that business needs can be bridged by I&T.
details: Langkah ini menghubungkan tujuan bisnis dengan fokus pengelolaan informasi dan teknologi.
Alignment goals membantu diskusi prioritas menjadi lebih operasional.

goal_cascade.title: Governance and management objectives
goal_cascade.summary: Alignment goals are translated into COBIT objectives which are the basis for design, implementation and evaluation of the governance system.
details: Pada tahap ini enterprise masuk ke domain dan objective yang lebih spesifik.
Core model membantu memilih objective yang paling relevan untuk konteks enterprise.

implementation_phases.title: What is the impetus?
implementation_phases.summary: Start by understanding the problems, opportunities, pressures, or aspirations that make the company need to move.
implementation_phases.importance: Tanpa driver yang jelas, implementasi mudah terasa seperti proyek administratif.
focus: Identify the most pressing business reasons and risks.
Build urgency that stakeholders can understand.
details: Identifikasi alasan bisnis dan risiko yang paling mendesak.
Bangun urgensi yang bisa dipahami stakeholder.
educational_tips: Pastikan ada 'Sponsor' dari level direksi agar inisiatif tidak berhenti di tengah jalan.
Identifikasi 'Pain Points' TI yang paling dirasakan oleh unit bisnis saat ini.

implementation_phases.title: Where do we stand now?
implementation_phases.summary: Assess current conditions to see gaps, obstacles, and areas that are mature enough.
implementation_phases.importance: Baseline yang jujur membantu roadmap menjadi realistis.
focus: Understand objective conditions, not assumptions.
Map strong areas and weak areas.
details: Pahami kondisi objektif, bukan asumsi.
Petakan area kuat dan area yang masih rapuh.
educational_tips: Lakukan 'Gap Analysis' yang jujur; jangan menutupi kekurangan kapabilitas yang ada.
Gunakan kriteria penilaian maturitas COBIT yang objektif.

implementation_phases.title: Where do we want to go?
implementation_phases.summary: Determine the targets you want to achieve, prioritized objectives, and expected results.
implementation_phases.importance: Tahap ini mencegah organisasi bergerak tanpa definisi sukses yang jelas.
focus: Determine targets that are relevant to the enterprise context.
Choose the objectives and outcomes that are really needed.
details: Tentukan target yang relevan dengan konteks enterprise.
Pilih objective dan outcome yang benar-benar dibutuhkan.
educational_tips: Target tidak harus langsung Level 5; mulailah dari level yang realistis untuk organisasi.
Pilih 'Quick Wins' untuk menunjukkan nilai positif tata kelola dalam waktu singkat.

implementation_phases.title: What to do?
implementation_phases.summary: Organize initiatives, work sequences, resources, and changes needed to close priority gaps.
implementation_phases.importance: Roadmap yang konkret membuat COBIT bisa ditindaklanjuti lintas fungsi.
focus: Break down targets into manageable work packages.
Determine priorities and dependencies between initiatives.
details: Turunkan target menjadi paket kerja yang bisa dikelola.
Tentukan prioritas dan dependency antar-inisiatif.
educational_tips: Detailkan siapa melakukan apa (RACI Chart) untuk setiap langkah perbaikan.
Alokasikan budget and sumber daya manusia secara konkret.

implementation_phases.title: How do we get there?
implementation_phases.summary: Execute change programs, manage stakeholders, and ensure implementation remains in line with initial objectives.
implementation_phases.importance: Perubahan governance selalu bersinggungan dengan perilaku, bukan cuma dokumen.
focus: Manage change enablement and communication.
Ensure implementation translates to work practices.
details: Kelola change enablement dan komunikasi.
Pastikan implementasi diterjemahkan ke praktik kerja.
educational_tips: Fokuslah pada perubahan perilaku, bukan sekadar tumpukan dokumen kebijakan.
Berikan pelatihan yang relevan bagi personil yang menjalankan proses baru.

implementation_phases.title: Are we there yet?
implementation_phases.summary: Measure results, review achievements, and see whether changes are actually producing the desired outcomes.
implementation_phases.importance: Tahap ini menjaga agar implementasi tidak dianggap selesai hanya karena artefak sudah dibuat.
focus: Compare actual results with targets.
Ensure there is a better reading of the benefits, risks and resources.
details: Bandingkan hasil aktual dengan target.
Pastikan ada pembacaan manfaat, risiko, dan resource yang lebih baik.
educational_tips: Gunakan dashboard dashboard untuk mengomunikasikan capaian kepada stakeholder.
Evaluasi apakah risiko TI benar-benar berkurang setelah implementasi.

implementation_phases.title: How to maintain momentum?
implementation_phases.summary: Continue improvements, update priorities, and ensure the governance system remains relevant to new changes.
implementation_phases.importance: Governance yang baik dijaga sebagai kebiasaan, bukan kegiatan sesaat.
focus: Use the evaluation results for the next iteration.
Keep the governance system alive and growing.
details: Gunakan hasil evaluasi untuk iterasi berikutnya.
Jaga governance system tetap hidup dan berkembang.
educational_tips: Tata kelola adalah perjalanan, bukan tujuan akhir. Jaga agar tetap relevan.
Lakukan audit berkala untuk memastikan standar tetap dijalankan dengan konsisten.

audiences.title: Board and governing body
audiences.summary: This group uses COBIT to ensure I&T is truly directed, monitored, and linked to enterprise value.
details: Membantu melihat apakah arah, pengawasan, dan akuntabilitas sudah cukup kuat.
Cocok untuk diskusi tingkat strategi dan pengambilan keputusan besar.

audiences.title: Executive management and business owners
audiences.summary: COBIT provides a common language for aligning business goals, technology priorities, and change needs.
details: Memudahkan penetapan prioritas capability dan portfolio perubahan.
Membantu menjaga keputusan I&T tetap relevan bagi operasi dan tujuan bisnis.

audiences.title: Risk, compliance, audit and assurance
audiences.summary: The assurance group uses COBIT as a structure for reading controls, accountability, performance, and areas that need to be tested.
details: Berguna untuk menyusun lingkup review dan memberi penilaian yang lebih konsisten.
Membantu menerjemahkan governance ke dalam assurance yang lebih terarah.

audiences.title: I&T leader and implementation team
audiences.summary: I&T teams use COBIT to align delivery, operations, and change with enterprise governance direction.
details: Bisa dipakai untuk memetakan objective mana yang perlu diperkuat lebih dulu.
Membantu tim teknis memahami ekspektasi governance dalam bahasa yang lebih sistematis.
